title: World Cup Injury Table | RotoWire Soccer
original_text: The 2026 FIFA World Cup injury report tracks the fitness status of players across all 48 nations competing in the United States, Canada, and Mexico. Check back for real-time updates on doubtful and ruled-out players ahead of each matchday, with coverage spanning the group stage through the final.
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
